gates.name: Gate A (North Gate)
gates.description: Main public entry gate. Direct access to the Arena Central Metro Station via the North Pedestrian Walkway. Best for fans arriving via public transit.

gates.name: Gate B (South Gate)
gates.description: Public entry gate. Closest to Parking Lot B (South Lot) and the south bus terminal.

gates.name: Gate C (East Gate)
gates.description: Public entry gate. Closest to Parking Lot C (East Lot) and the regional shuttle drop-off area.

gates.name: Gate D (West Gate - VIP & Accessible)
gates.description: Dedicated VIP, Media, and Accessible/Mobility-impaired entry gate. Directly adjacent to the VIP Parking Lot and the Rideshare Drop-off Zone. Accessible golf cart shuttle service departs from here.

concourse_facilities.first_aid: First Aid Station 1 (Concourse level, behind Block 108)
None (Use First Aid Station 1 in Zone A or Station 2 in Zone C)
First Aid Station 2 (Concourse level, behind Block 127)
First Aid Station 3 (Inside VIP Lobby, near Gate D)

transportation_hubs.name: Arena Central Metro Station
transportation_hubs.directions: Exit the stadium via Gate A. Follow the green line markings along the North Pedestrian Walkway. The station is a 5-minute walk. Trains run every 2 minutes post-match.

transportation_hubs.name: Parking Lot A (North)
transportation_hubs.directions: Located directly outside Gate A. Serves pre-booked vehicle permits only.

transportation_hubs.name: Parking Lot B (South)
transportation_hubs.directions: Exit via Gate B. Walk straight across South Concourse Walkway. Parking spaces B1-B200. Accessible parking located in Row 1.

transportation_hubs.name: Parking Lot C (East)
transportation_hubs.directions: Exit via Gate C. Cross the East Access Road at the designated pedestrian crossing.

transportation_hubs.name: Rideshare Pickup/Dropoff Zone (West)
transportation_hubs.directions: Exit via Gate D. Follow the 'Rideshare' signs to the designated lane. Vehicles can only pick up/drop off in this zone.

transportation_hubs.name: East Bus Terminal
transportation_hubs.directions: Exit via Gate C. Shuttle buses to downtown and major transit centers depart from platform 1-10.
